metadata.name: bonding_curve
metadata.description: Dr Fraudsworth Bonding Curve - Linear price discovery for CRIME and FRAUD

instructions.name: burn_bc_admin
docs: Permanently burn the admin key by setting authority to Pubkey::default().
After this, all admin-gated instructions become permanently uncallable.
Irreversible. Only the current authority can call this.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The current authority. Must match admin_config.authority.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: The BcAdminConfig PDA. After this instruction, authority will be Pubkey::default().

instructions.name: claim_refund
docs: Burn tokens and claim proportional SOL refund.
User-signed: burns the caller's entire token balance.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user claiming the refund. Receives SOL.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA. Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: partner_curve_state
docs: Partner CurveState PDA (read-only).
Required for is_refund_eligible() compound state check.
Must be a different curve than curve_state.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's ATA for this token. Must already exist (user holds tokens).
Marked mut because burn deducts from this account.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (CRIME or FRAUD).
Marked mut because burn reduces the mint's total_supply.

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- sends SOL refund to user.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint].

instructions.name: close_token_vault
docs: Close a graduated curve's empty token vault, recovering rent to admin.
Admin-only: only the protocol deployer can call.
Vault must have 0 token balance.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority (deployer). Must match BcAdminConfig.authority. Receives rent.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be Graduated.
Seeds: ["curve", token_mint]. Acts as token vault authority for close CPI.

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault PDA to close. Must be empty (0 token balance).
Seeds: ["curve_token_vault", token_mint]. Validated against curve_state.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (for close_account CPI context).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program (CRIME/FRAUD use Token-2022).

instructions.name: consolidate_for_refund
docs: Consolidate tax escrow into SOL vault for refunds.
Permissionless: anyone can call once the curve is refund-eligible.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA for the curve being consolidated.
Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: partner_curve_state
docs: Partner CurveState PDA (read-only).
Required for is_refund_eligible() compound state check.
Must be a different curve than curve_state (prevents passing same curve
as its own partner, which would bypass the partner status check).

accounts.name: tax_escrow
docs: Tax escrow PDA -- SOL-only, owned by bonding curve program.
Seeds: ["tax_escrow", token_mint].

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- receives consolidated escrow lamports.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint].

instructions.name: distribute_tax_escrow
docs: Distribute tax escrow SOL to the carnage fund after graduation.
Permissionless: anyone can call once the curve has graduated.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA (read-only -- no state mutations).
Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: tax_escrow
docs: Tax escrow PDA -- SOL-only, owned by bonding curve program.
Seeds: ["tax_escrow", token_mint].

accounts.name: carnage_fund
docs: Carnage fund SOL vault PDA (owned by epoch program).

instructions.name: fund_curve
docs: Fund the curve's token vault with the 460M tokens for sale.
Must be called after initialize_curve and before start_curve.
Accepts remaining_accounts for Transfer Hook support.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority. Must match BcAdminConfig.authority. Signs the token transfer.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be in Initialized status.
Not mutated (status doesn't change on fund, only on start).

accounts.name: authority_token_account
docs: Authority's token account (source of 460M tokens).
This is typically the admin's ATA for this token.

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Curve's token vault PDA (destination).
Authority is curve_state PDA (set during initialize_curve).

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for transfer_checked decimals validation.

instructions.name: initialize_bc_admin
docs: Initialize the BcAdminConfig PDA. Only callable by the program's
upgrade authority (verified via ProgramData). Stores the admin pubkey
that gates all admin-only instructions.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The program's upgrade authority. Must sign to prove deployer identity.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: The BcAdminConfig PDA. Initialized once; stores the authority pubkey and bump.
Seeds: [b"bc_admin"]

accounts.name: program
docs: The BondingCurve program itself -- used to look up its programdata address.

accounts.name: program_data
docs: The program's ProgramData account (created by the BPF loader on deploy).
Constraint: its upgrade_authority_address must equal the signing authority.
This is how we verify the caller is the deployer.

instructions.name: initialize_curve
docs: Initialize a CurveState PDA for a given token (CRIME or FRAUD).
Creates the curve in `Initialized` status with all counters zeroed.
Also creates token vault, SOL vault, and tax escrow PDAs.
Admin-only: only the protocol authority can call this.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority. Must match BcAdminConfig.authority. Pays rent for all new accounts.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- seeds: ["curve", token_mint].
Initialized with space for the full CurveState struct.

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault PDA -- holds 460M tokens for sale.
Authority is the curve_state PDA (transfers out require PDA signer).
Seeds: ["curve_token_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- 0-byte SOL-only account that holds raised SOL.
Balance is tracked via lamports, not data fields.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: tax_escrow
docs: Tax escrow PDA -- 0-byte SOL-only account that holds sell tax.
See Bonding_Curve_Spec.md Section 5.7.
Seeds: ["tax_escrow", token_mint].

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (CRIME or FRAUD). Validated via feature-gated constraint.
In localnet mode, any mint is accepted for testing flexibility.

instructions.name: mark_failed
docs: Mark a curve as Failed after deadline + grace buffer expires.
Permissionless: anyone can call once the deadline has passed.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA. Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].
Status check is in handler (not constraint) for specific error messages.

instructions.name: prepare_transition
docs: Transition both curves from Filled to Graduated.
Admin-only: only the protocol deployer can call.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority (deployer). Must match BcAdminConfig.authority.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: crime_curve_state
docs: CRIME CurveState PDA. Seeds: ["curve", crime_token_mint].

accounts.name: fraud_curve_state
docs: FRAUD CurveState PDA. Seeds: ["curve", fraud_token_mint].

instructions.name: purchase
docs: Purchase tokens from the curve with SOL.
Walks the linear price curve forward, enforces per-wallet cap and minimum purchase.
Accepts remaining_accounts for Transfer Hook support (CRIME/FRAUD use Token-2022 hooks).

accounts.name: user
docs: The buyer. Pays SOL and receives tokens.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be Active. Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's ATA for this token. Created if it doesn't exist (init_if_needed).
Used for wallet cap enforcement (read balance before transfer).

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Curve's token vault PDA. Authority is curve_state PDA.
Seeds: ["curve_token_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- 0-byte SOL-only account that holds raised SOL.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (CRIME or FRAUD).

instructions.name: sell
docs: Sell tokens back to the curve for SOL minus 15% tax.
Tax is routed to a separate escrow PDA.
Accepts remaining_accounts for Transfer Hook support.

accounts.name: user
docs: The seller. Receives SOL minus tax.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be Active. Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's ATA for this token. Must already exist (seller owns tokens).

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Curve's token vault PDA. Receives tokens back from seller.
Seeds: ["curve_token_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- sends SOL to user and tax to escrow.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint].

accounts.name: tax_escrow
docs: Tax escrow PDA -- receives 15% sell tax.
Seeds: ["tax_escrow", token_mint].

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (CRIME or FRAUD).

instructions.name: start_curve
docs: Activate the curve: sets status to Active, records start_slot and deadline_slot.
Validates that the token vault is fully funded before activation.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority. Must match BcAdminConfig.authority.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be in Initialized status. Mutated to Active.

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault PDA -- read-only to check balance >= TARGET_TOKENS.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for vault validation.

instructions.name: transfer_bc_admin
docs: Transfer the admin authority to a new pubkey (e.g., Squads multisig vault).
Only the current authority can call this. new_authority must not be Pubkey::default().

accounts.name: authority
docs: The current authority. Must match admin_config.authority.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: The BcAdminConfig PDA. After this instruction, authority will be new_authority.

instructions.name: withdraw_graduated_sol
docs: Withdraw SOL from a graduated curve's SOL vault.
Admin-only: only the protocol deployer can call.
Leaves rent-exempt minimum in vault. Idempotent.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority (deployer). Must match BcAdminConfig.authority. Receives SOL.

accounts.name: admin_config
docs: BcAdminConfig PDA -- gates admin operations.

accounts.name: curve_state
docs: CurveState PDA -- must be Graduated.
Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA -- source of SOL.
Seeds: ["curve_sol_vault", token_mint]. Validated against curve_state.sol_vault.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the admin

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in curve calculation

errors.name: CurveNotActive
errors.msg: Curve is not active for purchases

errors.name: CurveNotActiveForSell
errors.msg: Curve is not active for sells

errors.name: DeadlinePassed
errors.msg: Curve deadline has passed

errors.name: BelowMinimum
errors.msg: Purchase amount is below minimum (0.05 SOL)

errors.name: WalletCapExceeded
errors.msg: Purchase would exceed per-wallet cap of 20M tokens

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage exceeded -- output below minimum specified

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Invalid curve status for this operation

errors.name: CurveNotFunded
errors.msg: Curve token vault has not been funded

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Token amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientTokenBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance for sell

errors.name: EscrowNotConsolidated
errors.msg: Tax escrow must be consolidated before refund

errors.name: NotRefundEligible
errors.msg: Curve is not eligible for refunds

errors.name: CurveAlreadyFilled
errors.msg: Curve has already reached its target

errors.name: InsufficientTokensOut
errors.msg: Purchase too small -- calculated tokens out is zero

errors.name: VaultInsolvency
errors.msg: Vault solvency invariant violated -- SOL vault balance below expected

errors.name: DeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: Deadline and grace period have not passed yet

errors.name: CurveNotGraduated
errors.msg: Curve has not graduated

errors.name: NothingToBurn
errors.msg: No tokens to burn -- user balance is zero

errors.name: EscrowAlreadyConsolidated
errors.msg: Tax escrow has already been consolidated

errors.name: EscrowAlreadyDistributed
errors.msg: Tax escrow has already been distributed

errors.name: CRIMECurveNotFilled
errors.msg: CRIME curve is not filled

errors.name: FRAUDCurveNotFilled
errors.msg: FRAUD curve is not filled

errors.name: NoTokensOutstanding
errors.msg: No tokens outstanding -- cannot calculate refund

errors.name: PartialFillOvercharge
errors.msg: Partial fill overcharge -- actual SOL exceeds input amount

errors.name: InvalidPartnerCurve
errors.msg: Invalid partner curve -- token mint mismatch

errors.name: InvalidHookAccounts
errors.msg: Invalid hook accounts -- expected exactly 4 remaining accounts

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid authority: cannot transfer to Pubkey::default()

types.name: BcAdminConfig
docs: Global admin configuration for the Bonding Curve program.
This PDA is initialized once by the program's upgrade authority,
storing the admin pubkey that gates all admin-only instructions
(initialize_curve, fund_curve, start_curve, prepare_transition,
withdraw_graduated_sol, close_token_vault).
The admin can be a multisig address — not required to be the upgrade authority.
Once burned (authority set to Pubkey::default()), admin operations are
permanently disabled.
Seeds: [b"bc_admin"]

fields.name: authority
docs: The admin pubkey authorized to perform admin operations.
Set to Pubkey::default() after burn to permanently revoke.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for re-derivation in downstream instructions.

types.name: CurveFailed
docs: Emitted when the curve fails (deadline passed without filling).

types.name: CurveFilled
docs: Emitted when the curve reaches its target (460M sold / 1000 SOL raised).

types.name: CurveFunded
docs: Emitted when the curve's token vault is funded with 460M tokens.

types.name: CurveInitialized
docs: Emitted when a new bonding curve is initialized for a token.

types.name: CurveStarted
docs: Emitted when the curve is activated for purchases.

types.name: CurveState
docs: Per-token bonding curve state account.
One CurveState exists for CRIME, one for FRAUD.
Seeds: ["curve", token_mint].
Size: 8 (discriminator) + 224 (data) = 232 bytes.
Field sizes:
token:            1 byte  (enum Tag)
token_mint:      32 bytes (Pubkey)
token_vault:     32 bytes (Pubkey)
sol_vault:       32 bytes (Pubkey)
tokens_sold:      8 bytes (u64)
sol_raised:       8 bytes (u64)
status:           1 byte  (enum Tag)
start_slot:       8 bytes (u64)
deadline_slot:    8 bytes (u64)
participant_count: 4 bytes (u32)
tokens_returned:  8 bytes (u64)
sol_returned:     8 bytes (u64)
tax_collected:    8 bytes (u64)
tax_escrow:      32 bytes (Pubkey)
bump:             1 byte  (u8)
escrow_consolidated: 1 byte (bool)
partner_mint:    32 bytes (Pubkey)
Total data:     224 bytes

fields.name: token
docs: Token this curve is selling (CRIME or FRAUD).

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Mint address of the token being sold.

fields.name: token_vault
docs: PDA holding tokens for sale.

fields.name: sol_vault
docs: PDA holding raised SOL.

fields.name: tokens_sold
docs: Total tokens currently sold (decreases on sells).

fields.name: sol_raised
docs: Total SOL raised from buys (gross, does not decrease on sells).

fields.name: status
docs: Curve status.

fields.name: start_slot
docs: Slot when curve started (0 if not started).

fields.name: deadline_slot
docs: Deadline slot (start_slot + DEADLINE_SLOTS).

fields.name: participant_count
docs: Number of unique purchasers (incremented on first buy when user ATA balance was 0).

fields.name: tokens_returned
docs: Cumulative tokens returned to curve via sells.

fields.name: sol_returned
docs: Cumulative SOL returned to sellers (gross, before tax deduction).

fields.name: tax_collected
docs: Cumulative sell tax collected (15% of gross sell proceeds).

fields.name: tax_escrow
docs: PDA address of this curve's tax escrow account.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this CurveState.

fields.name: escrow_consolidated
docs: Whether tax escrow has been consolidated into sol_vault for refunds.

fields.name: partner_mint
docs: Mint address of the partner curve's token (CRIME curve stores FRAUD mint, vice versa).
Used to validate partner_curve_state identity in claim_refund / consolidate_for_refund.

types.name: CurveStatus
docs: Lifecycle status of a bonding curve.
State machine transitions:
Initialized -> Active      (start_curve: curve funded, authority calls)
Active      -> Filled      (purchase: tokens_sold >= TARGET_TOKENS)
Active      -> Failed      (mark_failed: clock.slot > deadline_slot)
Filled      -> Graduated   (finalize_transition: partner also Filled/Graduated)
Terminal states: Graduated, Failed.

types.name: EscrowConsolidated
docs: Emitted when tax escrow is consolidated back into the SOL vault (for refunds).

fields.name: escrow_amount
docs: Lamports moved from escrow to vault.

fields.name: new_vault_balance
docs: SOL vault balance after consolidation.

types.name: EscrowDistributed
docs: Emitted when tax escrow is distributed to the carnage fund (on graduation).

fields.name: amount
docs: Lamports sent to carnage fund.

fields.name: destination
docs: Carnage fund address.

types.name: RefundClaimed
docs: Emitted when a user claims a refund after curve failure.

fields.name: tokens_burned
docs: Tokens permanently destroyed (burned).

fields.name: refund_amount
docs: SOL returned to user.

fields.name: remaining_tokens_sold
docs: curve.tokens_sold after this claim.

fields.name: remaining_vault_balance
docs: sol_vault balance after this claim.

types.name: SolWithdrawn
docs: Emitted when SOL is withdrawn from a graduated curve's SOL vault.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint of the graduated curve.

fields.name: amount
docs: Lamports withdrawn.

types.name: TaxCollected
docs: Emitted when sell tax is collected into the escrow.

fields.name: amount
docs: Tax amount from this sell transaction.

fields.name: escrow_balance
docs: Total escrow balance after collection.

types.name: Token
docs: Which token this curve is selling.

types.name: TokenVaultClosed
docs: Emitted when a graduated curve's empty token vault is closed.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint of the graduated curve.

fields.name: rent_recovered
docs: Rent lamports recovered from closing the vault.

types.name: TokensPurchased
docs: Emitted when a user purchases tokens from the curve.

types.name: TokensSold
docs: Emitted when a user sells tokens back to the curve.

fields.name: tokens_sold
docs: Number of tokens sold back to the curve.

fields.name: sol_received_net
docs: SOL sent to user (after 15% tax deduction).

fields.name: tax_amount
docs: 15% tax amount routed to escrow.

fields.name: new_tokens_sold
docs: Updated curve.tokens_sold after this sell.

fields.name: current_price
docs: Price after sell (curve walks backward).

types.name: TransitionComplete
docs: Emitted when finalize_transition completes (terminal state).

types.name: TransitionPrepared
docs: Emitted when prepare_transition is called (both curves filled).
